name: Delta SkyMiles® Reserve American Express Card
effective_cost: Depends on Sky Club use and companion cert

verdict.text: Keep if you fly Delta often and actually use the lounges

earn_note: Narrow earning by design — 3× on Delta, flat 1× on everything else. This is a lounge-and-companion-cert card, not an everyday spend card.

points.note: Same SkyMiles currency and dynamic pricing as the Gold and Platinum tiers — the Reserve's value is mostly in lounge access and the companion cert, not in how it earns.

transfer_partners.highlight: SkyMiles can't be transferred out — they're stuck in Delta's program.
transfer_partners.recent_changes: You can transfer INTO SkyMiles from Amex MR (1:1), Chase UR and Capital One — useful for topping up an award.

credits.name: Free Checked Bags
credits.subtitle: 1st + 2nd (domestic)
credits.description: First checked bag free on Delta flights (you + up to 8 on the reservation); second bag free domestic.
tips: You don't need to pay for the flight with this card to get the free bag.

credits.name: Resy Dining Credit
credits.subtitle: $20/mo
credits.description: Up to $20/month in statement credits at U.S. Resy restaurants via Global Dining Access.
tips: Double the Gold/Platinum tiers' Resy credit — worth checking if you already dine at Resy restaurants monthly.

credits.name: Rideshare Credit
credits.subtitle: $10/mo
credits.description: Monthly U.S. rideshare credit with select providers.
tips: One qualifying ride a month recovers the full $120.

credits.name: Delta Stays Credit
credits.subtitle: prepaid hotels · calendar year
credits.description: Up to $200/yr (calendar year) on prepaid hotels or vacation rentals booked through Delta Stays on delta.com.
tips: Resets on the calendar year, not renewal — a new cardholder can use it twice on one annual fee.

credits.name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Credit
credits.subtitle: $120 GE or $85 TSA · every 4 years
credits.description: Statement credit for a Global Entry ($120) or TSA PreCheck ($85) application fee, once every 4 years. Shown here amortized to an annual figure.
tips: Apply for Global Entry, not just TSA PreCheck — it includes TSA PreCheck and covers the same credit.

credits.name: Companion Certificate
credits.subtitle: any cabin, incl. First Class · annual
credits.description: Each year after renewal, one round-trip companion ticket valid in any cabin — including Delta First, Premium Select, or Comfort+ — with the purchase of an eligible published fare. Companion pays only taxes/fees.
tips: The Reserve's companion cert works in First Class, unlike the Platinum's Main-Cabin-only version — the value swing is huge on routes where First is expensive.
$600 here is a conservative estimate; a premium-cabin redemption on a long route can be worth far more.

insurance.detail: Primary outside the US up to $75,000; secondary in the US

protection_note: Meaningfully better than the Gold and Platinum tiers on trip delay window (6 hrs, matching the best cards here) and rental coverage (primary outside the US). Still capped at 2 trip-delay claims/yr like every other Amex travel card.
rental_note: Primary coverage only outside the US — domestic rentals still fall back to secondary. For US rentals, Venture X or Sapphire Reserve's free primary coverage is stronger.

status_perks.name: Delta Sky Club Access
status_perks.note: 15 visits per Medallion Year when flying Delta, plus 4 guest passes/yr ($50/guest after). Unlimited visits unlock after $75,000/yr in card spend.

status_perks.name: Centurion Lounge Access
status_perks.note: Complimentary access when you book your Delta flight with this card — narrower than the Amex Platinum's blanket Centurion access.

status_perks.name: Medallion head start
status_perks.note: $2,500 MQD annually plus $1 MQD per $10 spent — double the earn rate of the Platinum's $1-per-$20.

services.name: Priority boarding & upgrade priority
services.detail: Zone 5 priority boarding, plus upgrade list placement above Gold/Platinum cardholders (below Medallion elites).

services.name: No foreign transaction fees
services.detail: Zero FX fees on international spend.

additional_cards.title: Additional cards

benefits.text: Free to add — no annual fee for additional Reserve cards
1st free checked bag + priority boarding when flying Delta
Own Global Entry / TSA PreCheck credit
Shares the account's Sky Club visits and companion cert — no separate set

additional_cards.note: Additional Reserve cards are free, and each one gets its own free-bag and priority-boarding perk — but Sky Club visits and the companion certificate are tied to the primary account.
